title: VDE Pay Grade Rates Extracted from Salary Charts, 2024–2026 (Derived)
description: Extracted bi-weekly pay rates for VDE grades 20, 21, 23 at key steps (1, 5, 10, 12) for each of the five CBA effective dates 2024-07-14 through 2026-07-12, plus CY2023 actual CTHRU annual-pay statistics by VDE title. Derived by extracting the relevant grade rows from the five effective-*.md salary-chart captures. VDE I = Grade 20, VDE II = Grade 21, VDE III = Grade 23.

columns.name: cthru_actual_paid_2023.avg
columns.description: Average actual annual pay from CTHRU CY2023 (block also has n/min/max).

source.publisher: SEIU Local 509 / Commonwealth of Massachusetts (Unit 8 & 10 CBA) and Massachusetts Office of the Comptroller (CTHRU)

notes: Derived from the five effective-*.md salary-chart files in this folder. cthru_actual_paid_2023 reflects pre-2024-07 pay rates. Annual estimate = bi-weekly × 26.
